title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Patni Computer Systems

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Patni Computer Systems
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Patni Computer Systems. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Patni Computer Systems:
Patni Computer Systems is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems!
